title: verbascum scamandri
intro: Verbascum scamandri, also known as the Rock Mullein, is a flowering plant species belonging to the mullein family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant contains saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which provide anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, contributing to its health benefits. Rock Mullein can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for herbal remedies, although its use should be consulted with a medical professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
